zh.Durhams, South Mimms, Middlesex, England: 英國米德萊可素斯 米姆斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Durham於大約1231年出生在英國英格蘭倫敦時，他的父親Thomas Durham38歲，母親Sarah35歲。他於大約1251年與Sabine結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1284年之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Durhams, South Mimms, Middlesex, England: 英国米德萊可素斯 米姆斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Durham于大约1231年出生在英国英格兰倫敦时，他的父亲Thomas Durham38岁，母亲Sarah35岁。他于大约1251年与Sabine结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1284年之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Durham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from the city of Durham, recorded as Dunholm in 1056 and Duram in 1297, named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ (see Down 1) + late Old English holm (from Old Norse holmr ‘island’).

variants.name: Down
meanings: English (Devon): topographic name for someone who lived on or near a down or low hill, from Middle English dun(e), doun(e) (Old English dūn) ‘down, low hill’. See also Downer .

English (Devon): possibly in some cases a patronymic from the Old English personal name Dūn, but later names of this origin cannot reliably be distinguished from those originating from the topographic sense. See Dunn 2.

variants.name: Derham
meanings: English: habitational name from Dearham in Cumbria, East and West Dereham in Norfolk, or Dyrham in Gloucestershire, named from Old English dēor ‘deer’ + hām ‘settlement, homestead’, or hamm ‘enclosed land, water meadow’.
Irish (mainly Dublin, Drogheda, and Cork): of English origin, but MacLysaght takes this to be a variant of   Durham  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Durham was born about 1231, in London, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Durham, was 38 and his mother, Sarah, was 35. He married Sabine about 1251. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died before 1284, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Durham est né environ 1231, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Durham, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Sarah, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Sabine environ 1251. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé avant 1284, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Durham um 1231 in London, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Durham 38 und seine Mutter Sarah 35. Er hat um 1251 Sabine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb vor 1284 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Durham è nato il circa 1231 nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Durham, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Sarah, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Sabine circa 1251. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì prima del 1284, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Durhamが約1231年にイギリスイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父Thomas Durhamは38歳，母Sarahは35歳であった。約1251年にSabineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1284年以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Durham(이)가 대략 1231년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Durham(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1251년 Sabine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1284년 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Durham nasceu aproximadamente 1231, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Durham, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Sarah, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Sabine aproximadamente 1251. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 1284, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Durham родился около 1231 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Durham было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Sabine около 1251 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер перед 1284 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Durham nació aproximadamente 1231, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Durham, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Sarah, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Sabine aproximadamente 1251. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió antes de 1284, en su pueblo.
